name: Shamik Basu
headline: AI Enabled Data Scientist
summary: Data scientist with 2+ years shipping production machine learning pipelines, LLM systems, and analytics workflows with measurable business impact. Cut operational costs 72% on a production RAG system processing 5M+ records/month and improved fraud identification accuracy 27% while reducing false positives. Strong in Python, SQL, statistics, experimentation, machine learning, and LLM/agentic systems.

highlights.blurb: Won the sustainability track with EcoMate-AI, a multimodal agentic platform built in 24 hours.
Agentic AI for creator teams (FastAPI + Next.js + GPT-4o VLM) that catches trends, generates scripts, and assigns the work.
Leading a 250-member graduate data science community with workshops, ideathons, and projects.

experience.summary: Deployed production SLM inference in Docker, fine-tuning open-source models end-to-end (tokenization + LoRA adapters) for optimized, domain-specific inference on financial data.
Automated M&A target sourcing with an agentic LangChain pipeline (Python) chaining LLM entity classification, web scraping, and structured extraction to identify and rank strategic buyers.

Architected a production RAG pipeline (LangChain + GPT-3.5 Turbo + REST APIs) processing 5M+ medical records/month - cutting operational costs 72% at 92% extraction accuracy. Added Langfuse observability and migrated batch jobs to a Kafka event-driven architecture for zero-downtime inference.

Redesigned the production NER pipeline to boost fraud identification accuracy 27% while reducing false positives, and shipped a supervised model (logistic regression + feature engineering) that improved operational efficiency 22%.
Scaled ETL and analytics to 10M+ records across 200+ features by designing a distributed system (C++, Trino, Docker) with optimized SQL, analytical query processing, and disaster recovery.

projects.name: Trend Pilot
projects.tagline: Agentic AI assistant for creator teams - catches trends, decides what to film, and assigns the work. Multi-agent system with GPT-4o VLM trend detection.

projects.name: EcoMate-AI
projects.tagline: 1st-place multimodal agentic platform turning receipts and activity into sustainability actions.

projects.name: Custom CUDA Library for CNN Pre-Processing
projects.tagline: Shared-memory tiled CUDA kernels delivering 115x CPU and 14x PyTorch preprocessing speedups.

projects.name: Smooth Operation
projects.tagline: Turns Atlassian workflow chaos into clarity with real-time flow graphs and heatmaps.

education.degree: Master of Science, Applied Data Science
education.coursework: Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Data Mining (MapReduce), Data Management
Algorithms, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Probability & Queueing Theory

leadership.org: GRIDS - Graduate Data Science Club, USC
leadership.summary: Lead analytics workshops, ideathons, and projects for a 250-member graduate data science community.
Mentor graduate students on data science career paths, technical communication, and professional development.
